# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dev-three-tier-vnet
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Virtual Network
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.0.0/16
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Virtual Network
  webSubnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: web-subnet
    metadata:
      description: Name of the web tier subnet
  webSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.1.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the web tier subnet
  appSubnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: app-subnet
    metadata:
      description: Name of the app tier subnet
  appSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.2.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the app tier subnet
  dbSubnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: db-subnet
    metadata:
      description: Name of the database tier subnet
  dbSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.3.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the database tier subnet
  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dev
    allowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    metadata:
      description: Environment tag for the resources
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('webSubnetName'), '-nsg')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: web
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-HTTP-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: Allow-HTTPS-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('appSubnetName'), '-nsg')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: app
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-Web-To-App
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "8080"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: Deny-Direct-Internet-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('dbSubnetName'), '-nsg')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: database
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-App-To-DB-SQL
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "1433"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: Allow-App-To-DB-MySQL
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "3306"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: Deny-Direct-Internet-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: three-tier-application
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(parameters('webSubnetName'), '-nsg'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(parameters('appSubnetName'), '-nsg'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(parameters('dbSubnetName'), '-nsg'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      enableDdosProtection: false
      subnets:
        - name: "[parameters('webSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(parameters('webSubnetName'), '-nsg'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Disabled
        - name: "[parameters('appSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(parameters('appSubnetName'), '-nsg'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Disabled
        - name: "[parameters('dbSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', concat(parameters('dbSubnetName'), '-nsg'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Disabled
outputs:
  vnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  vnetName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
  webSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('webSubnetName'))]"
  appSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('appSubnetName'))]"
  dbSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('dbSubnetName'))]"
  webSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
  appSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
  dbSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
